description: Deno webgpu-doe helper API benchmark: Doe helper vs raw deno-webgpu (wgpu)

doe-api.notes: Doe helper API on Doe via Deno node-compat N-API layer

deno-webgpu.notes: Raw Deno built-in WebGPU backed by wgpu (requires --unstable-webgpu)

comparability.notes: Both providers measured at JS API boundary. Left uses webgpu-doe helpers, right uses raw WebGPU. Both dispatch identical GPU work and readback.
